zh.Closeburn, Dumfriesshire, Scotland: 英國蘇格蘭度福利爾可洛本
zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger Kirkpatrick於1276年出生在蘇格蘭度福利爾可洛本時，他的父親Sir Stephen Kirkpatrick Lord of Closeburn30歲，母親Lady Isabella de Torthorwald26歲。他和Kirkpatrick至少有4個兒子。他去世於1340年在英國享年64歲。

zh-hans.Closeburn, Dumfriesshire, Scotland: 英国苏格兰度福利爾可洛本
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger Kirkpatrick于1276年出生在苏格兰度福利爾可洛本时，他的父亲Sir Stephen Kirkpatrick Lord of Closeburn30岁，母亲Lady Isabella de Torthorwald26岁。他和Kirkpatrick至少有4个儿子。他去世于1340年在英国享年64岁。

nameMeanings.name: Kirkpatrick
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from either of two places in Dumfriess called Kirkpatrick or any of various other places in Scotland, all so named from the dedication of their church to Saint Patrick. The Scottish word kirk sometimes replaced Gaelic cill ‘church’ in placenames; compare Kilpatrick .

variants.name: Kilpatrick
meanings: Irish (Ulster): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Giolla Phádraig ‘son of the servant of (Saint) Patrick’ (Irish Pádraig). See also Fitzpatrick .
Scottish: habitational name from any of various places called in Gaelic as cill Padraig ‘church of (Saint) Patrick’. See also Kirkpatrick .

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger Kirkpatrick was born in 1276, in Closeburn, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, his father, Sir Stephen Kirkpatrick Lord of Closeburn, was 30 and his mother, Lady Isabella de Torthorwald, was 26. He had at least 4 sons with Kirkpatrick. He died in 1340, in England, at the age of 64.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger Kirkpatrick est né en 1276, à Closeburn, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, son père, Sir Stephen Kirkpatrick Lord of Closeburn, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Lady Isabella de Torthorwald, avait 26 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils avec Kirkpatrick. Il est décédé en 1340, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 64 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger Kirkpatrick 1276 in Closeburn, Dumfriesshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Stephen Kirkpatrick Lord of Closeburn 30 und seine Mutter Lady Isabella de Torthorwald 26. Er hatte mit Kirkpatrick mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb 1340 im Alter von 64 Jahren in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Kirkpatrick è nato il nel 1276 nel Closeburn, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Sir Stephen Kirkpatrick Lord of Closeburn, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Lady Isabella de Torthorwald, aveva 26 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli con Kirkpatrick. Morì nel 1340, nel England, all'età di 64 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger Kirkpatrickが1276年にスコットランドダムフリーシュアイアクロセブルンで生まれた時，父Sir Stephen Kirkpatrick Lord of Closeburnは30歳，母Lady Isabella de Torthorwaldは26歳であった。彼はKirkpatrickとの間に少なくとも4人の息子をもうけた。彼は1340年にイギリスで64歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger Kirkpatrick(이)가 1276년 스컷랜드 드프리실르 클로세번에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Stephen Kirkpatrick Lord of Closeburn(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Isabella de Torthorwald(은)는 26세였다. 그는 Kirkpatrick(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1340년 영국에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Closeburn, Dumfriesshire, Scotland: Closeburn, Dumfreize, Шотланд, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Kirkpatrick nasceu em 1276, em Closeburn, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir Stephen Kirkpatrick Lord of Closeburn, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Lady Isabella de Torthorwald, tinha 26 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos com Kirkpatrick. Ele faleceu em 1340, em Inglaterra, com 64 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger Kirkpatrick родился в 1276 г. в местности клосебурн, думфриессхир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir Stephen Kirkpatrick Lord of Closeburn было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Isabella de Torthorwald, 26. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына от Kirkpatrick. Он умер в 1340 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 64 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Roger Kirkpatrick nació en 1276, en Closeburn, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir Stephen Kirkpatrick Lord of Closeburn, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Lady Isabella de Torthorwald, tenía 26 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos con Kirkpatrick. Murió en 1340, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 64 años.
